aculei_velenosi.label: Venomous Spines
aculei_velenosi.mutazione_indotta: Dorsal bristles have turned hollow, grafted onto sacs that distil hemolytic toxins.
aculei_velenosi.spinta_selettiva: One bite was not enough: the wound had to keep killing after the contact.
aculei_velenosi.uso_funzione: Every melee hit applies 3 turns of bleeding through vascular breakdown.
aculei_velenosi.debolezza: The toxins must get in: against thick armour the spines draw no blood.

adattamento_volo.label: Gliding Adaptation
adattamento_volo.mutazione_indotta: Skin folds stretch between the limbs, turning every jump into a controlled glide.
adattamento_volo.spinta_selettiva: The worst ground was also the safest: those who glided over it stopped paying its price.
adattamento_volo.uso_funzione: At grade 1 the glide cancels the extra movement cost of normal terrain.
adattamento_volo.debolezza: A glide cannot be corrected midway: whoever starts one no longer picks the landing.

ali_ioniche.label: Ionic Wings
ali_ioniche.mutazione_indotta: Wing membranes gather charge along metallic veins and release it in micro-pulses.
ali_ioniche.spinta_selettiva: In the ionic canopy the air is already electric: whoever can spend it moves first.
ali_ioniche.uso_funzione: An attack delivered from an elevated position applies 1 turn of stun.
ali_ioniche.debolezza: The stun lasts an instant: if the pack does not exploit it at once, it is wasted.

antenne_flusso_mareale.label: Tidal-Flow Antennae
antenne_flusso_mareale.mutazione_indotta: The antennae tuned themselves to the tide's rhythm, storing the surge in muscular ducts.
antenne_flusso_mareale.spinta_selettiva: In the bioreactive lagoon, striking off-beat means striking water and nothing else.
antenne_flusso_mareale.uso_funzione: On a clean hit (margin 5 or more) perfect timing adds 2 damage.
antenne_flusso_mareale.debolezza: A sloppy blow misses the surge: without precision the antennae add nothing.

artigli_psionici.label: Psionic Claws
artigli_psionici.mutazione_indotta: The claws conduct thought: every grip lifts a fragment of the mind they touch.
artigli_psionici.spinta_selettiva: Whoever hunts the same pack twice learns that knowing the prey beats wounding it.
artigli_psionici.uso_funzione: A melee hit reads the prey: defending against that same prey accrues damage reduction, up to 3.
artigli_psionici.debolezza: The read comes only by contact: against those who keep their distance the claws learn nothing.

aura_glaciale.label: Glacial Aura
aura_glaciale.mutazione_indotta: Peripheral blood drops below freezing and the air around the body condenses into rime.
aura_glaciale.spinta_selettiva: Slowing the prey costs less than chasing it, and cold never tires.
aura_glaciale.uso_funzione: Each hit applies 2 turns of chill: the target loses 1 AP on reset and suffers -1 to attack rolls.
aura_glaciale.debolezza: Rime dissolves where the air is warm: in scorching biomes the aura cannot condense.

canto_di_richiamo.label: Calling Chant
canto_di_richiamo.mutazione_indotta: The vocal sacs widened into chambers that hold a note as long as an entire breath.
canto_di_richiamo.spinta_selettiva: A pack that does not honour its prey forgets why it hunts together.
canto_di_richiamo.uso_funzione: After a kill the chant amplifies fury for 2 turns and honours the fallen prey.
canto_di_richiamo.debolezza: Two turns of fury are few: the chant arrives when the fight is already decided.

cervello_predittivo.label: Predictive Brain
cervello_predittivo.mutazione_indotta: The cortex runs one step ahead of the present and sees the motion before it happens.
cervello_predittivo.spinta_selettiva: Between equals, the winner arrives where the other will be, not where the other is.
cervello_predittivo.uso_funzione: On an excellent hit (margin 6 or more) the target is stunned for 2 turns.
cervello_predittivo.debolezza: Prediction assumes a rule: against the random, the cortex is confidently wrong.

corteccia_memetica.label: Memetic Bark
corteccia_memetica.mutazione_indotta: The bark records every heavy blow as a scar that allies know how to read.
corteccia_memetica.spinta_selettiva: In ancient woods, survival belongs to those who turn their wound into a shared warning.
corteccia_memetica.uso_funzione: After taking a hit of 3 damage or more it hardens (damage -2) and grants allies within 3 a +1 attack.
corteccia_memetica.debolezza: It needs a real wound: against light attrition the bark never wakes.

criostasi_adattiva.label: Adaptive Cryostasis
criostasi_adattiva.mutazione_indotta: The blood loads with cryoprotective enzymes that halt metabolism without shattering tissue.
criostasi_adattiva.spinta_selettiva: Those who cannot cross the winter must learn to sleep through it.
criostasi_adattiva.uso_funzione: Once activated it stiffens the tissues: +2 defence for 1 turn and +20% resistance to the ionic channel.
criostasi_adattiva.debolezza: The stasis lasts a single turn: outside that window the body stands exposed.

cuore_in_furia.label: Heart in Fury
cuore_in_furia.mutazione_indotta: The myocardium has grown past measure and sustains a tachycardia that would kill a normal heart.
cuore_in_furia.spinta_selettiva: The first kill opens the rest: those who cannot ride the surge waste it.
cuore_in_furia.uso_funzione: After a kill the heart races into tachycardia, unleashing 3 turns of adrenal rage.
cuore_in_furia.debolezza: It takes a kill to light it: in a stalemate the heart never starts.

denti_seghettati.label: Serrated Teeth
denti_seghettati.mutazione_indotta: Dental cusps have splintered into recurved blades that hold flesh fast.
denti_seghettati.spinta_selettiva: Prey kept tearing free of the bite: the wound had to keep working on its own.
denti_seghettati.uso_funzione: The bite lacerates flesh and applies deep bleeding for 2 turns.
denti_seghettati.debolezza: The blades dull on armour and must regrow after every hard kill.

eco_sismico.label: Seismic Echo
eco_sismico.mutazione_indotta: Cutaneous plates sense the ground's tremor and return it amplified.
eco_sismico.spinta_selettiva: Under the rock, sight is useless: all that counts is feeling the weight approach.
eco_sismico.uso_funzione: A pulse marks the ground as a resonant zone for 2 rounds: whoever enters it is disoriented.
eco_sismico.debolezza: The zone does not chase: an enemy that walks around it suffers nothing.

ferocia.label: Ferocity
ferocia.mutazione_indotta: The adrenal glands stay half-open and pain always arrives a moment too late.
ferocia.spinta_selettiva: Under pressure hesitation kills more than the wound: the one who doubles the blow survives.
ferocia.uso_funzione: Every kill unleashes 3 turns of rage: no retreat, and +1 damage on successful hits.
ferocia.debolezza: In rage retreat is barred: whoever enters fury stays on the field even while losing.

filtri_bioattivi.label: Bioactive Filters
filtri_bioattivi.mutazione_indotta: A lattice of glands filters circulating blood and stitches tissue as it passes through.
filtri_bioattivi.spinta_selettiva: In fouled water a wound festers before it closes: a body had to wash itself.
filtri_bioattivi.uso_funzione: Each round it purges 1 bleed and 1 fracture, healing 1 for every status removed.
filtri_bioattivi.debolezza: The filter works one ailment at a time: under many statuses at once it falls behind.

intimidatore.label: Intimidating Aura
intimidatore.mutazione_indotta: The posture has set into a silhouette the prey's brain reads as inevitable.
intimidatore.spinta_selettiva: Prey that flees does not fight: frightening costs less than winning.
intimidatore.uso_funzione: Each successful melee hit applies 2 turns of panic to the target.
intimidatore.debolezza: Terror needs eyes and nearness: from afar it remains only a silhouette.

legame_di_branco.label: Pack Bond
legame_di_branco.mutazione_indotta: Vocalisations have shrunk to brief signals the pack decodes without looking at one another.
legame_di_branco.spinta_selettiva: A pack that discovers the threat together suffers it only once.
legame_di_branco.uso_funzione: When an adjacent packmate of the same species attacks, the bearer gains +1 attack and +1 defence until the end of the round.
legame_di_branco.debolezza: The bond recognises only its own species: in a mixed squad it stays mute.

marchio_predatorio.label: Predatory Mark
marchio_predatorio.mutazione_indotta: Axillary glands release a pheromone that clings to the prey and makes it legible to the pack.
marchio_predatorio.spinta_selettiva: Hunting in numbers means little if each hunter chases a different quarry.
marchio_predatorio.uso_funzione: Each hit marks the target for 2 turns: the next attack against it gains +1 damage and consumes the mark.
marchio_predatorio.debolezza: The mark is worth a single blow, spent by whoever strikes first, not by whoever strikes best.

membrane_osmotiche.label: Osmotic Membranes
membrane_osmotiche.mutazione_indotta: The outer membrane drinks what strikes it, holding part of it back before it reaches the blood.
membrane_osmotiche.spinta_selettiva: Where every touch is venom, an impermeable body wastes less time healing.
membrane_osmotiche.uso_funzione: Shortens every incoming status by 1 turn (a 1-turn status never lands); at end of round it heals 1 if adjacent to water or bog.
membrane_osmotiche.debolezza: Against a long status the absorption is a delay, not a defence.

mente_lucida.label: Lucid Mind
mente_lucida.mutazione_indotta: Attention does not drift with fear: the gaze holds where the guard opens.
mente_lucida.spinta_selettiva: In panic everyone sees the weapon. The winner keeps seeing the gap.
mente_lucida.uso_funzione: A clean hit (margin 5 or more) makes the target feel seen: 2 turns of panic.
mente_lucida.debolezza: Lucidity is slow: it costs an instant that close melee does not always grant.

midollo_iperattivo.label: Hyperactive Marrow
midollo_iperattivo.mutazione_indotta: The bone marrow floods with catecholamines as if every kill were the first.
midollo_iperattivo.spinta_selettiva: A serial hunter cannot afford to cool between one quarry and the next.
midollo_iperattivo.uso_funzione: Every kill pumps adrenaline and unleashes 3 turns of rage.
midollo_iperattivo.debolezza: The marrow consumes itself: the bones regrow slower than they are spent.

pelle_elastomera.label: Elastomeric Skin
pelle_elastomera.mutazione_indotta: The dermis has layered into elastomeric sheets that give the blow back instead of passing it on.
pelle_elastomera.spinta_selettiva: Against a predator you cannot avoid, the only answer is to absorb it and stay standing.
pelle_elastomera.uso_funzione: Cushions every incoming blow and reduces damage taken by 1.
pelle_elastomera.debolezza: The elastomer blunts impact, not the venom that passes through the skin.

pelli_anti_ustione.label: Burn-Resistant Hide
pelli_anti_ustione.mutazione_indotta: The dermal layer has filled with hollow cells that shed heat before it sinks in.
pelli_anti_ustione.spinta_selettiva: On lava crusts contact is brief and constant: to burn was a slow sentence.
pelli_anti_ustione.uso_funzione: The thermal cushion reduces every incoming hit by 1 damage.
pelli_anti_ustione.debolezza: One point less does not stop a heavy blow: against hard hitters it is nearly nothing.

pelli_cave.label: Hollow Hide
pelli_cave.mutazione_indotta: Air pockets have opened beneath the skin, keeping the heat out and the coolness in.
pelli_cave.spinta_selettiva: In arid land shade is not enough: the body must carry its own.
pelli_cave.uso_funzione: The air pockets cushion the impact and reduce every hit by 1 damage.
pelli_cave.debolezza: The pockets blunt the impact but not burns, nor the venom seeping through the pores.

pelli_fitte.label: Dense Hide
pelli_fitte.mutazione_indotta: The dermal fibres have woven as tight as felt, and water no longer finds a way out.
pelli_fitte.spinta_selettiva: Constant wind does not wound: it drains. Those who hold on survive.
pelli_fitte.uso_funzione: Every melee hit taken is blunted by 2 damage.
pelli_fitte.debolezza: The felt guards melee: against those who strike from afar it blunts nothing.

radici_ancora_planare.label: Planar Anchor Roots
radici_ancora_planare.mutazione_indotta: Roots break from the heels and bite into the plane where the body halts.
radici_ancora_planare.spinta_selettiva: A trunk does not flee. If it must take the blow, better to be impossible to move.
radici_ancora_planare.uso_funzione: At round start it takes root: while stationary it reduces damage by 2, but moving breaks the anchor.
radici_ancora_planare.debolezza: An enemy that does not attack it simply ignores it: anchored, the bearer chases no one.

sensori_sismici.label: Seismic Sensors
sensori_sismici.mutazione_indotta: Cutaneous receptors have sharpened enough to tell shifting weight from settling weight.
sensori_sismici.spinta_selettiva: A predator betrays the strike with its foot before its eyes.
sensori_sismici.uso_funzione: On a clean melee hit (margin 5 or more) it finds the opening and deals 1 extra damage.
sensori_sismici.debolezza: The ground must carry: on water and shifting sand the sensors fall silent.

spirito_combattivo.label: Combative Spirit
spirito_combattivo.mutazione_indotta: The amygdala has recalibrated downward: the threat arrives, but never takes command.
spirito_combattivo.spinta_selettiva: A pack that scatters at the first scream loses before it even fights.
spirito_combattivo.uso_funzione: When an adjacent ally attacks, the bearer gains +1 to attack until the end of the round.
spirito_combattivo.debolezza: Alone it is worth nothing: with no ally beside it, the morale never kindles.

spore_paniche.label: Panic Spores
spore_paniche.mutazione_indotta: Sporal sacs ripen beneath the skin and burst at the first sign of threat.
spore_paniche.spinta_selettiva: There is no need to kill the predator, only to convince it the pack is already lost.
spore_paniche.uso_funzione: Neurotoxic spores induce hallucinations and rout the target: 3 turns of panic.
spore_paniche.debolezza: A panicked target flees: the spores pull it out of reach before you can finish it.

sussurro_psichico.label: Psychic Whisper
sussurro_psichico.mutazione_indotta: A sublingual sac emits frequencies the eardrum misses and the nerve does not.
sussurro_psichico.spinta_selettiva: Confusing a stronger foe costs a breath; facing it costs the pack.
sussurro_psichico.uso_funzione: Each solid hit (margin 5 or more) applies 1 turn of disorientation: -2 to attack rolls.
sussurro_psichico.debolezza: It needs a clean blow: a barely landed touch never carries the whisper to the nerve.

tela_appiccicosa.label: Sticky Web
tela_appiccicosa.mutazione_indotta: Abdominal glands spin a secretion that hardens only when something tries to pull free.
tela_appiccicosa.spinta_selettiva: There is no need to outrun the prey: it only has to be slower than yesterday.
tela_appiccicosa.uso_funzione: Each hit applies 3 turns of slow: -1 AP on reset, with at least 1 AP guaranteed.
tela_appiccicosa.debolezza: Prey that stops pulling does not stay caught: the web punishes only those who struggle.

tentacoli_uncinati.label: Hooked Tentacles
tentacoli_uncinati.mutazione_indotta: Keratin hooks stud the tentacles and close backward like barbs.
tentacoli_uncinati.spinta_selettiva: Holding the prey one instant longer was worth a second bite.
tentacoli_uncinati.uso_funzione: Every melee hit applies 1 turn of fracture: the target drops to 1 AP.
tentacoli_uncinati.debolezza: A hook that goes in must come out: tearing free of armoured prey snaps them.

tessuti_adattivi.label: Adaptive Tissues
tessuti_adattivi.mutazione_indotta: The tissues sample what wounds them and reorganise against that very channel.
tessuti_adattivi.spinta_selettiva: An environment that strikes the same way twice teaches its survivors quickly.
tessuti_adattivi.uso_funzione: After taking 2 or more damage of one channel, it gains +15% resistance to that channel for 3 rounds and heals 1; at most 2 channels at once.
tessuti_adattivi.debolezza: The adaptation looks backward: whoever alternates damage channels never lets it learn.

voce_imperiosa.label: Imperious Voice
voce_imperiosa.mutazione_indotta: The vocal cords thickened into a chamber that resonates below the threshold of hearing.
voce_imperiosa.spinta_selettiva: In a pack the order to flee arrives before the predator: whoever speaks it commands.
voce_imperiosa.uso_funzione: In melee, a clean hit (margin 5 or more) applies 2 turns of panic.
voce_imperiosa.debolezza: It works only within earshot, and never touches what has no will to break.

zampe_a_molla.label: Spring-Loaded Limbs
zampe_a_molla.mutazione_indotta: The hind tendons have coiled into springs that hold the thrust between one leap and the next.
zampe_a_molla.spinta_selettiva: In the mycelial forest the ground gives way: those who stand still long enough sink.
zampe_a_molla.uso_funzione: Striking from an elevated position with a margin of 5 or more deals 1 extra damage.
zampe_a_molla.debolezza: The leap only serves to climb: without a precise strike from above the springs never pay.

zampe_radianti.label: Radiant Paws
zampe_radianti.mutazione_indotta: The paw pads store the shock of the fall and give it back on impact.
zampe_radianti.spinta_selettiva: Whoever strikes from above already holds the energy: it only had to survive the landing.
zampe_radianti.uso_funzione: Attacking from an elevated position, the kinetic pulse adds 2 damage on impact.
zampe_radianti.debolezza: It needs a drop: on level ground the paws have no fall to convert.

arco_voltaico.label: Voltaic Arc
arco_voltaico.mutazione_indotta: A dorsal filament has filled with electrogenic cells that store tension until it discharges in a visible arc.
arco_voltaico.spinta_selettiva: Hit the prey's nervous system before the teeth do: a disorienting flash is worth more than a bite.
arco_voltaico.uso_funzione: A successful ionic hit (MoS >= 5) applies 1 turn of disorient to the target; grants +15% ionic resistance.
arco_voltaico.debolezza: The arc must recharge: against targets insulated from the ground or well shielded, the discharge dissipates.

martello_osseo.label: Bone Hammer
martello_osseo.mutazione_indotta: The tip of a limb or tail has thickened into a compact bony mass, heavy as a mace.
martello_osseo.spinta_selettiva: Break the enemy's structure instead of wounding it: what cannot move cannot flee or counter.
martello_osseo.uso_funzione: Every critical (MoS >= 8) applies 2 turns of fracture: on reset the target is left with only 1 AP, limiting its movement.
martello_osseo.debolezza: The bony mass is slow to wind up: against agile targets the heavy blow misses its window.

pungiglione_paralizzante.label: Paralyzing Stinger
pungiglione_paralizzante.mutazione_indotta: A retractable stinger has filled with glands that synthesize an inhibitor neurotoxin.
pungiglione_paralizzante.spinta_selettiva: An immobilized prey needs no chasing: the venom does the work the muscles cannot.
pungiglione_paralizzante.uso_funzione: A precise melee hit (MoS >= 5) applies 2 turns of stunned: the target skips its next two turns.
pungiglione_paralizzante.debolezza: The toxin reserve is limited and must regenerate: against venom-resistant organisms the effect fades.

scarica_ionica.label: Ionic Discharge
scarica_ionica.mutazione_indotta: Specialized membranes accumulate ions along the body and release them in a direct pulse on contact.
scarica_ionica.spinta_selettiva: Add a shock to every blow: a small electric edge that wears the prey down over time.
scarica_ionica.uso_funzione: A successful ionic hit (MoS >= 5) releases a pulse dealing 1 extra HP of damage; grants +10% ionic resistance.
scarica_ionica.debolezza: The charge drains in humid or highly conductive environments, where the pulse dissipates before landing.

matrice_antimagia.label: Antimagic Matrix
matrice_antimagia.mutazione_indotta: In the constructs of the planar ruins, runic lattices etched into the body emit a field that destabilizes the active impulses of whatever it strikes.
matrice_antimagia.spinta_selettiva: Defend the planar sites from intruders capable of complex techniques: shutting down their abilities is worth more than wounding them.
matrice_antimagia.uso_funzione: Every successful close hit imposes inhibited for 1 turn: the target cannot use active abilities (movement, basic attacks, and reactions remain).
matrice_antimagia.debolezza: The field works only at close range and per single hit: targets relying on basic attacks are immune.

nuclei_di_controllo.label: Control Cores
nuclei_di_controllo.mutazione_indotta: A coordination core, typical of the ruin constructs, synchronizes the bearer's blows and those of nearby allies.
nuclei_di_controllo.spinta_selettiva: Turn a group into a coordinated unit: the sum of aligned blows beats individual initiative.
nuclei_di_controllo.uso_funzione: While the core is intact it coordinates blows (+1 attack) and radiates +1 attack to allies within range 2. A precise hit (MoS >= 5) damages it, a second destroys it with a +2 HP detonation.
nuclei_di_controllo.debolezza: The core is an exposed weak point: two precise hits shut it down and turn it into a weapon against the pack.

risonanza_magnetica.label: Magnetic Resonance
risonanza_magnetica.mutazione_indotta: The neural tissue has attuned to local magnetic fields, which vibrate in sync with the pack's mental frequencies.
risonanza_magnetica.spinta_selettiva: Communicate without sound or sight: in rift biomes silent coordination is a hunting advantage.
risonanza_magnetica.uso_funzione: A kill with MoS >= 5 activates a telepathic link for 5 turns, sharing tactical coordinates with nearby allies.
risonanza_magnetica.debolezza: The link triggers only after a kill and needs stable magnetic fields: away from rifts it fades.

equilibrio_vestibolare.label: Vestibular Balance
equilibrio_vestibolare.mutazione_indotta: The vestibular apparatus has sharpened until it corrects any loss of poise in real time.
equilibrio_vestibolare.spinta_selettiva: Stay standing where others fall: on unstable ground, balance decides who fights and who tumbles.
equilibrio_vestibolare.uso_funzione: Reduces damage from destabilizing attacks by 1 HP and softens falls.
equilibrio_vestibolare.debolezza: Poise control offers no protection from direct blows: against pure damage it provides no defense.

nocicezione.label: Nociception
nocicezione.mutazione_indotta: A hypersensitive nociceptive network converts pain into an immediate defensive response.
nocicezione.spinta_selettiva: Make pain a weapon: whoever wounds an already-hurt organism pays a costlier counter.
nocicezione.uso_funzione: When Wounded, reactive counterattacks deal +1 HP of damage.
nocicezione.debolezza: The advantage exists only while Wounded: at full health the reactivity does not trigger.

pigmenti_aurorali.label: Auroral Pigments
pigmenti_aurorali.mutazione_indotta: Dermal chromophores accumulate fluorescent compounds that ignite under polar light or magnetic storms.
pigmenti_aurorali.spinta_selettiva: A glow that confuses: dazzling those who come too close buys time to reposition.
pigmenti_aurorali.uso_funzione: While healthy (HP >= 50%), at end of round the pigments dazzle adjacent enemies: -1 to their next attack.
pigmenti_aurorali.debolezza: Below half health the glow goes out: exactly when it is needed most, the pigments fade.

propriocezione.label: Proprioception
propriocezione.mutazione_indotta: The sense of the body's position has sharpened until it guides every movement with millimetric precision.
propriocezione.spinta_selettiva: Always know where the limbs are: aim is born in the muscles before the eyes.
propriocezione.uso_funzione: Grants +1 to attacks thanks to constant control of balance and position.
propriocezione.debolezza: It is an edge of precision, not power: against high defenses the small bonus is not enough.

senso_magnetico.label: Magnetic Sense
senso_magnetico.mutazione_indotta: Magnetoreceptive receptors passively perceive the magnetic fields of the surrounding environment.
senso_magnetico.spinta_selettiva: Orient in the dark and feel metal before seeing it: an extra sense where sight cannot reach.
senso_magnetico.uso_funzione: Passive perception of magnetic fields: on each successful hit the unit sharpens its own magnetic sense (sensed, 1 turn). Prerequisite for magnetic resonance.
senso_magnetico.debolezza: In environments saturated with interference the signal blurs and perception loses sharpness.

sintonia_magnetica.label: Magnetic Attunement
sintonia_magnetica.mutazione_indotta: The sensory apparatus has adapted to rift electromagnetic turbulence, channeling its energy.
sintonia_magnetica.spinta_selettiva: Turn the biome's magnetic disturbance into an advantage: where others lose their bearings, the bearer attunes.
sintonia_magnetica.uso_funzione: A decisive hit (MoS >= 8) attunes the unit to the biome's magnetic energy for 2 turns. Prerequisite for magnetic resonance.
sintonia_magnetica.debolezza: Attunement depends on rift fields: outside magnetic biomes there is nothing to attune to.

termocezione.label: Thermoception
termocezione.mutazione_indotta: Thermal receptors spread across the skin keep a continuous hot/cold balance of the environment and the body.
termocezione.spinta_selettiva: Read heat to survive the extremes: whoever senses temperature suffers it less.
termocezione.uso_funzione: Reduces damage from thermal attacks (fire and ice) by 1 HP.
termocezione.debolezza: The defense is thermal only: against physical or ionic damage the receptors offer no protection.
